conversations.title: Give me 3 ranked action titles for a slide about…

messages.text: Give me 3 ranked action titles for a slide about aid disbursement rising 40%, and give it to me as a PDF file. Very short.

**Slide type: Finding**

1. **Aid disbursement has risen by 40% [fact], demonstrating accelerated delivery and stronger support for priority beneficiaries.** (16 words)  
   *Best captures the result and its significance.*

2. **A 40% [fact] rise in aid disbursement signals faster funding deployment across targeted humanitarian priorities.** (15 words)  
   *Emphasises improved deployment.*

3. **Aid disbursement is up 40% [fact], strengthening the programme’s capacity to meet urgent needs at scale.** (16 words)  
   *Connects growth to impact.*

**Gaps:** PDF file generation is unavailable in this interface; the copy above is PDF-ready.

```trace
Mode: FAST — Short action-title task using a user-supplied figure.
Worker: oda:action-titles
QA: Checked ranking, 15–20-word length, British English, factual tagging and slide classification.
Flags: PDF generation unavailable; 40% is user-supplied [fact].
```
